text:
@Hitesh Choudhary  Sir i have a One Assignment in Golang  
i don't how i solve this Plz help me

Assignment is here:-
The Micro Finance Service should run on Go and should support the following functionality 

1.	Authentication (Can use any Authentication Method) Using Redis Token (Generation/Validation)
2.	Create Account (Name/Location/PAN/Address/Contact Number/Sex/Nationality)
3.	Update Account 
4.	Delete Account
5.	Login/Logout
6.	Transactions (Credit / Debit)


Redis to be used for Authentication Token (Generation/Validation)
DB – Any SQL DB 
API Backend – Go Lang 


Test Cases:

1.	Write Unit Test cases for verifying Create/Delete Accounts
2.	Write Unit Test cases for Verifying Login/Logout
3.	Write Unit Test cases for Credit/Debit Transactions 
4.	Write Test Cases to Verify Connection Pool of DB CRUD operations.
